hero.title: Discover Minnesota
hero.welcome: Welcome Xinyi, Vivian, Anthony, and Taemin to Minnesota
hero.subtitle: Explore the Land of 10,000 Lakes, breathtaking landscapes, and iconic global brands.

home.intro_title: Welcome to the North Star State
home.intro_desc: Whether you have just a few days or weeks to explore, Minnesota offers an unparalleled mix of natural beauty, rich culture, and historic innovation. Choose your own adventure from our curated list of must-see destinations.

destinations.title: Top Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Tailor your 2-3 day itinerary based on your interests. Here are some of the most remarkable places to visit.

sculpture_garden.name: Minneapolis Sculpture Garden
sculpture_garden.description: An iconic Minneapolis landmark featuring the famous Spoonbridge and Cherry sculpture. Located near downtown Minneapolis, this beautiful garden is a must-visit for art lovers.

moa.name: Mall of America
moa.description: The largest shopping mall in the United States. Originally the site of the Metropolitan Stadium, it now features an indoor amusement park, aquarium, and hundreds of stores.

red_wing.name: Red Wing Town & Boot
red_wing.description: Famous for the Red Wing heritage boots that gained fame during WWII. A picturesque town just an hour's drive from the Twin Cities. Highly recommended for vintage fashion lovers and picking up a memorable pair of boots.

lake_city.name: Lake City
lake_city.description: The birthplace of water skiing. Enjoy stunning summer views that feel like being by the ocean. Located a short, scenic drive from Red Wing.

basilica.name: Basilica of Saint Mary
basilica.description: A prominent and beautiful Catholic basilica located in downtown Minneapolis, known for its stunning architecture.

guthrie.name: Guthrie Theater
guthrie.description: A renowned theater with unique architecture. The 'Endless Bridge' extends into mid-air and offers excellent, free public views. The land was donated by the city with the promise of lifetime free access to the public spaces.

st_anthony.name: Saint Anthony Falls
st_anthony.description: The 'Mother Falls' of Minneapolis. This natural wonder powered the city's early milling industry, giving rise to iconic brands like General Mills, Pillsbury, and Häagen-Dazs.

mia.name: Minneapolis Institute of Art (Mia)
mia.description: A high-quality museum featuring a vast collection of precious artifacts, including extensive Asian art exhibits. General admission is always free.

capitol.name: Minnesota State Capitol
capitol.description: The seat of the Minnesota state government in Saint Paul, featuring a magnificent dome and beautiful marble architecture.

arboretum.name: Minnesota Landscape Arboretum
arboretum.description: The University of Minnesota's expansive botanical garden, offering beautiful trails and diverse plant collections year-round.

como.name: Como Zoo & Conservatory
como.description: A wonderful, family-friendly destination featuring a zoo and a stunning glass-domed conservatory filled with lush tropical plants.

hill_house.name: James J. Hill House
hill_house.description: The historic, massive mansion of the famous railroad tycoon James J. Hill, located on Summit Avenue in Saint Paul.

cathedral.name: Cathedral of Saint Paul
cathedral.description: A breathtaking Catholic cathedral dominating the Saint Paul skyline, known for its classic Renaissance architecture.

rice_park.name: Rice Park
rice_park.description: A charming downtown Saint Paul park framed by Landmark Center, the Ordway, and the Saint Paul Hotel. It is an easy stop for a stroll, photos, and a quick break between nearby cultural landmarks.

brands.title: Iconic Brands & Companies
brands.subtitle: Minnesota is home to numerous Fortune 500 companies and brands that have shaped the world.

spam.name: Spam
spam.description: Invented by Hormel Foods in Austin, MN. It became a military staple during WWII and remains highly popular, especially in Asian markets.

red_wing_shoes.name: Red Wing Shoes
red_wing_shoes.description: Renowned for high-quality work boots and WWII paratrooper boots.

general_mills.name: General Mills
general_mills.description: A global food giant behind brands like Cheerios, Häagen-Dazs, Betty Crocker, and Yoplait.

pillsbury.name: Pillsbury
pillsbury.description: Famous for flour, baked goods, and cookie dough, represented by the iconic 'Pillsbury Doughboy'.

land_o_lakes.name: Land O'Lakes
land_o_lakes.description: One of America's largest dairy cooperatives, known for premium butter and cheese.

dairy_queen.name: Dairy Queen (DQ)
dairy_queen.description: World-famous ice cream and fast-food chain, headquartered in Bloomington, MN.

buffalo_wild_wings.name: Buffalo Wild Wings
buffalo_wild_wings.description: Famous for chicken wings and its sports bar atmosphere, headquartered in Minneapolis.

target.name: Target
target.description: A retail giant and popular discount department store headquartered in Minneapolis.

best_buy.name: Best Buy
best_buy.description: The largest consumer electronics retailer in the US, headquartered in Richfield, MN.

mayo_clinic.name: Mayo Clinic
mayo_clinic.description: A world-renowned medical institution in Rochester, MN, known for advanced research, diagnosis, and treatment.

medtronic.name: Medtronic
medtronic.description: The world's largest medical device company, producing pacemakers and surgical tools.

unitedhealth.name: UnitedHealth Group
unitedhealth.description: One of the world's largest health insurance and healthcare management companies, based in Minnetonka, MN.

cargill.name: Cargill
cargill.description: The largest privately held agricultural company globally, spanning food processing, trade, and finance.

3m.name: 3M
3m.description: A global innovation powerhouse that invented N95 masks, Post-it notes, and Scotch tape.

polaris.name: Polaris
polaris.description: Manufacturer of ATVs, snowmobiles, and watercraft.

toro.name: Toro
toro.description: Makers of premium landscaping, golf course maintenance, and snow removal equipment.

ecolab.name: Ecolab
ecolab.description: A global leader in water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions.

us_bank.name: U.S. Bank
us_bank.description: The fifth-largest bank in the United States, headquartered in Minneapolis.

ameriprise.name: Ameriprise Financial
ameriprise.description: A prominent wealth management, insurance, and financial services company.

thrivent.name: Thrivent
thrivent.description: A Christian-based financial company providing insurance, investments, and financial planning.

itineraries.title: Suggested Itineraries
itineraries.subtitle: Make the most of your trip with these curated plans designed to showcase the very best of Minnesota.

one_day.title: 1-Day: Twin Cities Highlights
one_day.desc: Perfect for a quick trip focusing on core cultural and historical landmarks.

morning.activity: Start at the Minneapolis Sculpture Garden for iconic photos, then visit the nearby Basilica of Saint Mary.

afternoon.activity: Enjoy world-class art at the Minneapolis Institute of Art (Mia), then head to the historic Saint Anthony Falls.

evening.activity: End the day at the Guthrie Theater—take in the view from the Endless Bridge and perhaps catch a show.

three_day.title: 3-Day: The Full Minnesota Experience
three_day.desc: A well-rounded trip balancing city culture, shopping, and natural beauty.

day_1.activity: Explore the Sculpture Garden and Mia. Then head to St. Paul to marvel at the State Capitol, Cathedral of Saint Paul, and James J. Hill House.

day_2.activity: Spend the morning admiring nature at Como Zoo & Conservatory, then dedicate the afternoon and evening to exploring the Mall of America.

day_3.activity: Head south for a scenic drive along the Mississippi River. Visit Red Wing for its heritage boots and charming town, then continue to Lake City for stunning waterside views.
